title: July 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 2''' is the 183rd day of the year (184th in leap years), with 182 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1900s#1906|1906]] – [[Alan Webb]] is born.
*[[1920s#1927|1927]] – [[Brock Peters]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Jasper Jacob]] is born.
*1958 – [[Stephen Rashbrook]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Tait Fletcher]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 123|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 123]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 10|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 10]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]] published.
*2003 – [[Empire 9|''Empire'' 9]] published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[William Shakespeare's Star Wars: Verily, A New Hope]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Starships, Speeders & Space Stations (Little Golden Book)|''Star Wars: Starships, Speeders & Space Stations'' Little Golden Book]] published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Common Ground]]" airs on [[Disney+]]
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends: The New Republic Omnibus Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2024 – "[[Teach / Corrupt]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories — Codebreaker 2|''Hyperspace Stories — Codebreaker'' 2]] published.
*2025 – [[Jedi Knights 5|''Jedi Knights'' 5]] published.
